name: The Calamity Tax

clock.src: lab ct_speed_lab kill_turns on calamity-tax-20260615.txt @12k dig=2 (deployed grind-fortress + anti-dragon pkg; dig-band: T13 floor@0 / T9 ceiling@3; 2026-06-15)

gamePlan: The deck ramps aggressively into a massive land count, uses Glarb's top-of-library engine to convert that mana into free spells and card advantage, then kills the table with scaling X-spells or copy effects on high-impact creatures. Seedborn Muse transforms Glarb from a once-per-turn engine into a once-per-opponent's-turn engine, and flash enablers let the deck cast MV4+ sorceries on any player's turn.
winLine: Torment of Hailfire X=12+ (requires ~14 total mana)

finishers.name: Torment of Hailfire
finishers.note: With Cabal Coffers + Urborg + 10 other lands = tap Coffers for 12+ mana.

finishers.name: Kokusho + Rite of Replication
finishers.note: Five legendary token copies of Kokusho enter → all five immediately die to the legend rule → each triggers "each opponent loses 5 life, you gain 5 life per opponent" → 25 damage per opponent, 75 life gained.

finishers.name: Doppelgang at High X
finishers.note: At X=3 targeting Archon of Cruelty + 2 lands: 3 Archon copies enter (each opponent discards 3, loses 9, sacrifices 3; you draw 3, gain 9) plus 6 extra lands.

finishers.name: Mirrorform
finishers.note: All nonland permanents you control become copies of target non-Aura permanent.

finishers.name: Gray Merchant Drain
finishers.note: Gray Merchant's ETB drains equal to black devotion.
